scripts.setup: node -e "require('fs').existsSync('.env') || require('fs').copyFileSync('.env.example', '.env')" && npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd .. && npm run setup:backend && npm run db:setup && npm run db:seed
scripts.dev:all: npm run db:start && npm run db:setup && npm run db:seed && npm run dev
scripts.db:start: docker compose up -d db || docker-compose up -d db
